name: Twenty-First Century Fox, Inc.
description: Twenty-First Century Fox, Inc., also known as 21st Century Fox (21CF), was an American multinational mass media corporation. It was one of the two companies formed from the 2013 spin-off of the publishing assets of News Corporation. 21st Century Fox held the film and television assets, including the Fox Entertainment Group, Fox Television Stations, and Star India, before its acquisition by The Walt Disney Company in 2019.
